name: openclaw-content-row
purpose: Structured discovery output that can feed N8tiveFlow batch and affiliate flows.
rules: Every item must have a keyword with clear intent.
Every item must map to a real productId or productCategory.
Every item must be visually representable.
Angles must come from angles.md patterns.
Titles should naturally include the keyword or its closest high-intent variant.
Descriptions must support the click, not just describe the product.
Reject generic, vague, or non-monetizable outputs.
board is optional but should be filled for Pinterest-first ideas when a clear board fit exists.
tags should be short, reusable labels rather than full hashtags.

examples.hook: Self-care content for people who are too tired for perfect routines.
examples.title: Funny Self Care Coloring Pages for Burned-Out Adults
examples.description: Low-effort creative self-care with humor and a little goblin energy. Built for stressed adults who want comfort without fake wellness fluff.
examples.targetAudience: stressed adults and chaotic self-care people
examples.visualConcept: A funny goblin-themed coloring page shown as a printable preview with cozy chaotic styling.
examples.imagePrompt: Funny goblin self-care coloring page preview, cozy chaotic vibe, printable layout, warm lighting, playful but tired energy.

examples.keyword: cheap desk gadgets that actually work
examples.hook: Budget desk upgrades that solve real annoyances instead of just looking good.
examples.title: Cheap Desk Gadgets That Actually Work
examples.description: A practical roundup for remote workers and developers who want comfort or productivity upgrades without wasting money on junk.
examples.visualConcept: Clean desk flatlay with 3-5 affordable gadgets highlighted as useful upgrades.
examples.imagePrompt: Clean desk setup flatlay with affordable productivity gadgets, modern workspace, practical not flashy, clear product grouping.
examples.cta: Save this for your next desk upgrade.

examples.hook: Halloween coloring that feels cute first and scary second.
examples.title: Kawaii Halloween Coloring Book That Is Cute, Not Creepy
examples.description: A spooky-cute coloring book angle built around adorable Halloween pages, giftability, and early seasonal discovery.
examples.targetAudience: kawaii fans, cute-aesthetic shoppers, and seasonal gift buyers
examples.useCase: cute seasonal coloring and giftable hobby content
examples.visualConcept: Colorful spooky-cute book cover or sample pages with ghosts, pumpkins, bats, and kawaii styling.
examples.imagePrompt: Spooky cute kawaii Halloween coloring book cover, pastel pumpkins, adorable ghosts and bats, playful seasonal art, cozy Halloween vibe.

fieldNotes.keyword: Primary search phrase or intent phrase.
fieldNotes.angle: Conversion angle from angles.md, such as 'best', 'worth it', 'cheap upgrades', or 'problem -> solution'.
fieldNotes.hook: Short click-driving framing line or content promise.
fieldNotes.title: Platform-ready working title, especially useful for Pinterest and article ideas.
fieldNotes.description: One to three sentence summary of the content angle.
fieldNotes.platform: Default output platform. Usually pinterest unless another platform is clearly a better fit.
fieldNotes.monetizationType: Use one of: amazon, owned_product, funnel_entry.
fieldNotes.productId: Preferred internal product identifier when known.
fieldNotes.productCategory: Fallback category if productId is not known yet.
fieldNotes.targetAudience: Who this idea is for in plain language.
fieldNotes.useCase: What job the content or product helps with.
fieldNotes.visualConcept: Describe what the image should clearly show.
fieldNotes.imagePrompt: Optional image generation prompt if visual needs to be created.
fieldNotes.tags: Short reusable content labels, not sentence fragments.
fieldNotes.cta: Soft click instruction or action request.
fieldNotes.linkType: Usually direct, but can be soft_sell or funnel when needed.
